query.sql: SELECT COALESCE(status, 'Unknown') as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM pm_projects GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC

option.raw: const data = ctx.data?.objects || []; return { title: { text: 'Projects by Status', left: 'center' }, tooltip: { trigger: 'item', formatter: '{b}: {c} ({d}%)' }, legend: { orient: 'horizontal', bottom: 0 }, series: [{ type: 'pie', radius: ['40%', '70%'], center: ['50%', '50%'], data: data.map(r => ({ name: r.name, value: Number(r.value) })), emphasis: { itemStyle: { shadowBlur: 10, shadowOffsetX: 0, shadowColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)' } }, label: { formatter: '{b}: {c}' } }] };
